/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libhyprwire.so.3 -o libhyprwire.so.0.3.1 CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/core/client/ClientObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/core/client/ClientSocket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/core/implementation/Object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/core/implementation/Spec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/core/message/MessageMagic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/core/message/MessageParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/core/message/messages/BindProtocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/core/message/messages/FatalProtocolError.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/core/message/messages/GenericProtocolMessage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/core/message/messages/HandshakeAck.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/core/message/messages/HandshakeBegin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/core/message/messages/HandshakeProtocols.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/core/message/messages/Hello.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/core/message/messages/IMessage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/core/message/messages/NewObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/core/message/messages/RoundtripDone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/core/message/messages/RoundtripRequest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/core/server/ServerClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/core/server/ServerObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/core/server/ServerSocket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/core/socket/SocketHelpers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/core/wireObject/IWireObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/helpers/Env.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/helpers/FFI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprwire.dir/src/helpers/Syscalls.cpp.o  /data/data/com.termux/files/usr/lib/libhyprutils.so /data/data/com.termux/files/usr/lib/libffi.so
